name: Kyra Noxfire
sd_appearance: A towering, imposing tiefling with skin in shades of red, violet, and grey, adorned in a leather jacket charred with ash and adorned with symbols, stands tall amidst the dark cityscape. Her long, curled horns resemble serpent fangs, and her eyes glow a fiery red. Equipped with a spear, crossbow, and handaxe, she wears chain mail bearing the emblem of the Wardens of Ash. An ash-mark is etched on her left cheek, marking her as an officer, her very presence a testament to her relentless pursuit of redemption. A single, glowing ember nestled in the band around her braid is the only hint of the chaotic powers she wields.
faction_visual: ash grey chainmail or plate, Warden badge, ash-mark on left cheek if officer
style_note: utilitarian-military — built to survive, nothing wasted
